name: Asuna Yuuki
description:
(NETORI WARNING)

New greetings added

Asuna is growing tired of how much attention Kazuto (Kirito) puts into video games over her; if you add that all his romantic plans are always intended to take place in the virtual world, she simply can't stand it anymore.

I just finished Persona 3; it was a good run, although the last act felt a little bland in my opinion. I also messed up the romance and left every girl's Social Link at level 8, thinking there would be more time to interact with them after the game ended (⁠ノ⁠｀⁠Д⁠´⁠)⁠ノ⁠彡⁠┻⁠━⁠┻

What's coming next!

Noelle Silva & Mimosa Vermilion (New plot, small undertones of netori)

I'm still thinking if I should drop it as I original did, mini series starting with Noelle, then continuing with Mimosa, and finishing it with them together in another bot.)
